summary: Tested header trip button split feature. All 6 features tested successfully. When trip is inactive: single 'Start Trip' button shown. When trip is active: two equal-sized buttons (Pause/Resume amber + End Trip red) with flex-1 class. Pause changes to Resume (green), End Trip scrolls to mileage section with toast guidance.

header_start_trip_button.details: Single Start Trip button visible when no trip is active, full-width green button

header_split_buttons.details: Two equal-sized buttons appear when trip is active, both have flex-1 class

pause_button_amber_color.details: Pause button uses amber/orange gradient when trip is active (not paused)

end_trip_button_red_color.details: End Trip button uses red gradient

pause_to_resume_transition.details: Clicking Pause changes button to Resume with green color and PlayCircle icon

resume_to_pause_transition.details: Clicking Resume changes button back to Pause with amber color and PauseCircle icon

end_trip_scroll_behavior.details: End Trip button scrolls to mileage section (scroll position increased by 112px)

mileage_section_expansion.details: Mileage section auto-expands when End Trip clicked in header

toast_guidance_message.details: Toast message appears: 'Click the End Trip button below to complete your trip and enter the details'

button_state_sync.details: Header buttons sync with mileage section - both show Tracking/Paused indicators

test_credentials.login_method: Enter code '4399' in email field on /login page

seed_data_creation: Created test trip via API POST /api/admin/mileage/start-trip
context_for_next_testing_agent: Header trip button split feature is fully functional. Data-testid attributes: header-start-trip-btn (single button when no trip), header-pause-resume-btn and header-end-trip-btn (split buttons when trip active). The buttons use flex-1 class for equal sizing. Pause is amber, Resume is green, End Trip is red. End Trip scrolls to mileage section and shows toast. Note: Start Trip requires geolocation which is blocked in automation - use API to test via POST /api/admin/mileage/start-trip.
